nasb.text: Now He was also saying to the disciples, “There was a rich man who had a manager, and this manager was reported to him as squandering his possessions.

esv.text: He also said to the disciples, “There was a rich man who had a manager, and charges were brought to him that this man was wasting his possessions.

cnv.text: 耶穌又對門徒說：“有一個財主的管家，有人在他主人面前告他浪費主人的財物。

ccb.text: 耶稣又对门徒说：“某财主有个管家，有人控告这管家浪费主人的财物。

csbs.text: 耶稣又对门徒们说：“某财主有个管家，这个管家被人控告挥霍主人的财产。
